global.description: The ad features a bright yellow background with promotional text and a call-to-action button.
global.main_message: Order fast food with free delivery over $15.

elements.label: Yellow background
elements.description: A solid yellow background that fills the entire canvas, providing a bright and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: FreshDash logo
elements.description: A simple logo at the top left, featuring the text 'FreshDash' in a bold, modern font against a light background.

elements.label: Empty space
elements.description: A blank rectangular area in the center, suggesting a placeholder for an image or graphic.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: Bold black text at the bottom stating 'Fast food, fast Free delivery over $15' with a smaller font for the price '€9.99'.
elements.text_content: Fast food, fast Free delivery over $15 €9.99 Order now

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small rectangular badge in the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in white text on a contrasting background.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Order now' in bold, inviting font, encouraging immediate action.
